title: calophyllum cordato-oblongum
intro: Calophyllum cordato-oblongum, also known as the Suren or Koyadiah tree, is a species of tree in the family Calophyllaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Indo-Pacific region. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of Calophyllum cordato-oblongum include its use in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, including oil and extracts, have been traditionally used in folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
